theme_and_archetype.domain: SaaS Web Dashboard & Developer/UX Testing Tool
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Objective, rigorous, high-end, smooth. The Apple-like aesthetic means crisp whites, deep blacks, high-contrast system colors for status, and structural use of whitespace instead of dividers.

rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or generic fonts for headings.
Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Maintain a strong hierarchy: Never jump more than 2 tailwind sizing steps between a heading and its subheading.
All numeric data (scores, metrics) must use tabular-nums utility for alignment.
Code blocks or terminal outputs in the real-time monitor must use JetBrains Mono.
Use colors structurally. 95% of the UI should be monochrome (white/grey/black). Use accents strictly for actions, states, and data visualization.
Never use pure black or pure grey. Tint greys slightly if needed, but #1D1D1F (Apple Dark) is preferred for text.
Hover states must be explicitly styled (e.g., hover:bg-gray-100) and must maintain contrast.

marketing_landing.rules: Use large text, floating glass components, and generous whitespace. Avoid standard Bootstrap grids. Introduce overlapping elements for the hero section.

dashboard_monitoring.rules: High density, real-time data focus. Use F-pattern scanning. Top-left must be the critical metric. Use a collapsible sidebar. Maximize vertical space for the live activity feed and cinematic video streaming.

reports_and_personas.rules: Mix shapes and aspect ratios. A large span for the Executive Report chart, smaller squares for Persona scores. Never fill the grid symmetrically; leave breathing room.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky Navbars, Floating Action Panels, Video Overlays
glassmorphism.classes: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-black/5 shadow-sm

dashboard_cards.classes: bg-white rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] overflow-hidden

terminal_panel.usage: Real-time activity feed, CLI logs, root cause analysis blocks
terminal_panel.classes: bg-[#1D1D1F] text-gray-200 rounded-xl p-4 font-mono text-sm border border-black shadow-inner

component_instructions.buttons: Rounded completely (rounded-full) or Apple-style slightly rounded (rounded-lg). Primary button is Brand Blue with white text. No default Shadcn button styles.
component_instructions.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized. Remove harsh focus rings, use subtle blue focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0071E3]/30).
component_instructions.tables: Go borderless on internal rows, use generous padding (py-4). Left-align text, right-align numeric scores.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Tooltips must use the Glassmorphism surface strategy. Palettes for charts must be the Success/Warning/Critical colors mapped to UX/Accessibility/Reliability scores.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke-width at 1.5 for a premium, clean look.
component_instructions.video_player: Cinematic presentation. Wrap the video evidence in a black container with subtle glass controls overlay. Add a 'LIVE' pulsating red dot indicator for real-time monitoring.
component_instructions.general: Do not use raw HTML components for complex interactions (dropdowns, calendars). Use Shadcn primitives but ensure file extensions are .js/.jsx, not .tsx.

rules: Use Framer Motion for page transitions and staggering bento grid items.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95).
Activity Feed: New logs should slide in from the top with a subtle fade.
Marquee: Use 'react-fast-marquee' for benchmark logos (Google, Stripe, Notion) in a subtle, low-contrast grayscale ribbon.

media_and_images.description: Abstract white glass reflection - use as a subtle background behind the marketing hero.
Clean white circular reflection - use in feature sections.
Abstract light blue curves - use for background texture in the new test run wizard.
Dashboard user interface on screen - use inside a device mockup in the marketing hero.
Vibrant green matrix/code stream - use as a visual texture for the root cause analysis or test agent terminal window.
Google search page on a screen - use as an environmental representation of the Google benchmark in the benchmark comparison view.
Stripe app displayed on a mobile device - use as an environmental representation of the Stripe benchmark.
Abstract organic shape representing Notion - use as a placeholder for the Notion benchmark if vector logo is unavailable.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing_attributes.convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='run-test-button', data-testid='realtime-feed-panel', data-testid='accessibility-score-value'.

critical_reminders: Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx), strictly use .js/.jsx for all React components.
Ensure all Grid children are direct children (if using Framer Motion, motion.div must be the direct child).
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for headers; always use a backdrop blur or solid fill.
